enrichment.short_description: Email marketing platform with drag-and-drop campaigns, automation, and a free-forever plan for up to 2,500 subscribers.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Sender is an email marketing platform offering campaigns and automation, with a free plan for up to 2,500 subscribers and 15,000 emails/month.

features.title: Drag-and-drop email builder
features.description: Build responsive email campaigns using a visual editor with a template library.

features.title: Marketing automation
features.description: Create automated workflows with unlimited automation and segmentation rules.

features.title: Landing pages and forms
features.description: Build landing pages, popups, and signup forms to grow subscriber lists.

features.title: A/B testing
features.description: Test subject lines, content, and send times to optimize campaign performance.

features.title: Transactional email
features.description: Send transactional emails alongside marketing campaigns.

features.title: SMS messaging
features.description: Send SMS campaigns on paid plans in addition to email.

features.title: Ecommerce integrations
features.description: Connect with WooCommerce, PrestaShop, Shopify, Jumpseller, and Zapier.

pros: Free forever plan includes automation and segmentation, not just basic sending
No daily sending limit on the free plan (up to 15,000 emails/month)
Built-in ecommerce integrations with WooCommerce, Shopify, and PrestaShop
24/7 live support offered across plans
cons: Standard and Professional plan prices are not published as static numbers on the pricing page
Free plan includes Sender branding on emails
No native mobile app mentioned on the site
No AI features mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Does Sender have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free Forever plan supports up to 2,500 subscribers and 15,000 emails per month with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Can I send SMS campaigns with Sender?
faqs.answer: Yes, SMS messaging is available starting with the Standard plan.

faqs.question: What ecommerce platforms does Sender integrate with?
faqs.answer: Sender integrates with WooCommerce, PrestaShop, Shopify, Jumpseller, and Zapier.

faqs.question: Is there an enterprise option?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Enterprise plan offers custom pricing with unlimited emails, SSO (SAML v2), an SLA, and a dedicated success manager.

use_cases.title: Starting email marketing for free
use_cases.description: Small teams run automated campaigns and segmentation on the free plan before upgrading.

use_cases.title: Ecommerce email and SMS
use_cases.description: Stores use built-in WooCommerce/Shopify integrations plus SMS messaging for promotions.

use_cases.title: Multi-seat marketing teams
use_cases.description: Standard and Professional plans add role-based seats for collaborating teams.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Sender?
paragraphs: Sender is an email marketing platform for building, automating, and sending campaigns, with a drag-and-drop editor and a template library.
The platform includes a free-forever plan covering up to 2,500 subscribers and 15,000 emails per month, alongside paid plans that add SMS messaging, more seats, and enterprise features like SSO.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Sender is for
paragraphs: Sender fits small businesses and ecommerce stores that want automation and segmentation without paying for a paid tier first, thanks to built-in integrations with WooCommerce, Shopify, and PrestaShop.

enrichment.short_description: Multi-channel marketing platform combining email, SMS, chatbots, and a CRM, with a free tier for small volumes.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: SendPulse offers email, SMS, chatbot, and CRM tools in one platform, with a free plan covering 15,000 emails and 3 chatbots per month.

features.title: Email marketing
features.description: Drag-and-drop email builder with 140+ templates and open/click analytics.

features.title: Chatbot builders
features.description: Build chatbots for Instagram, TikTok, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Telegram, and Viber.

features.title: CRM with sales pipeline
features.description: Track deals and customers in a built-in CRM system.

features.title: Landing page builder
features.description: Create landing pages without a separate tool.

features.title: Web push and pop-ups
features.description: Send web push notifications and use pop-up forms to capture leads.

features.title: Bulk SMS campaigns
features.description: Send SMS marketing campaigns alongside email and chat.

features.title: Live chat
features.description: Online chat widget for on-site customer conversations.

pros: Combines email, chat, CRM, and SMS in one platform instead of separate tools
Free plan includes chatbots, a CRM, and a landing page builder, not just email
Mobile apps for iOS and Android plus a Chrome extension
High third-party review ratings (4.6-5 stars across Capterra, G2, GetApp, Trustpilot)
cons: Free plan limits are relatively low (3 chatbots, 15,000 emails/month)
Paid plans are priced in EUR with billing-cycle discounts, complicating direct comparison
Enterprise plan requires a minimum of 2,500 contacts
SMS pricing is not itemized on the main pricing page

faqs.question: Is SendPulse free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan offers 15,000 emails/month, 3 chatbots, a CRM, and a landing page builder with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Which messaging channels does SendPulse support for chatbots?
faqs.answer: Instagram, TikTok, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Telegram, and Viber.

faqs.question: Does SendPulse have mobile apps?
faqs.answer: Yes, iOS and Android apps are available, along with a Chrome extension.

faqs.question: Does SendPulse offer pay-as-you-go pricing?
faqs.answer: Yes, purchased email credits are valid for one year as an alternative to subscription plans.

use_cases.title: All-in-one small business marketing
use_cases.description: Businesses use the free plan to combine email, a landing page, and a basic CRM without extra tools.

use_cases.title: Social media chatbot support
use_cases.description: Teams build chatbots across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Telegram to automate customer conversations.

use_cases.title: Multi-channel campaigns
use_cases.description: Marketers combine email, SMS, and web push in the same automation workflows.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is SendPulse?
paragraphs: SendPulse is a multi-channel marketing platform that combines email campaigns, chatbots, a CRM, landing pages, SMS, and web push notifications in one account.
A free plan covers 15,000 emails per month, three chatbots, a basic CRM, and a landing page builder; paid plans starting around €8.80/month add unlimited emails, more users, and advanced automation.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who SendPulse is for
paragraphs: SendPulse suits small businesses and marketing teams that want email, chat, and CRM functionality together rather than buying separate tools for each channel.

enrichment.short_description: Unified commerce platform for mid-market ecommerce brands, combining marketing automation, storefronts, POS, and fulfillment.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Maropost is a unified commerce platform for mid-market retailers, combining marketing automation, storefronts, POS, and fulfillment tools.

features.title: Marketing Cloud
features.description: Cross-channel email, SMS, and social campaigns with automation and a landing page builder.

features.title: Commerce Cloud
features.description: Multi-storefront management with catalogs supporting 1M+ SKUs.

features.title: Retail Cloud
features.description: Omnichannel POS unifying ecommerce and in-store retail operations.

features.title: Merchandising Cloud
features.description: AI-driven search, personalization, and product recommendations.

features.title: Service Cloud
features.description: Omnichannel customer support with an AI chatbot and unified customer profiles.

features.title: Da Vinci AI
features.description: Predictive intelligence and workflow automation across the platform.

pros: Combines marketing, commerce, POS, and service in one connected platform
Pre-built integrations with Shopify, Stripe, Salesforce, Meta, and Google Analytics
AI-driven personalization and search built into the merchandising tools
Free trial available without requiring an upfront sales call
cons: No public pricing published; requires a demo or trial signup to get a quote
Positioned specifically at mid-market brands ($20M-$200M revenue), which may not fit very small businesses
Some AI agent capabilities are marked "coming soon" rather than currently available
Founding year and headquarters are not published on the site

faqs.question: What is Maropost?
faqs.answer: A unified commerce platform combining storefronts, inventory, marketing automation, POS, and customer service for mid-market ecommerce brands.

faqs.question: Does Maropost offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free trial is available via the site's free-trial page, along with demo bookings.

faqs.question: What ecommerce platforms does Maropost integrate with?
faqs.answer: Pre-built integrations include Shopify, Stripe, Salesforce, Meta, Google Analytics, ClickBank, and Zapier, plus open APIs.

faqs.question: Does Maropost use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, the platform includes AI-driven insights, an AI chatbot for support, and Da Vinci AI for predictive intelligence and workflow automation.

use_cases.title: Cross-channel marketing automation
use_cases.description: Retailers run coordinated email, SMS, and social campaigns from the Marketing Cloud.

use_cases.title: Unified retail and ecommerce operations
use_cases.description: Brands manage storefronts, POS, and inventory together instead of stitching together separate systems.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted merchandising
use_cases.description: Merchandisers use AI-driven search and recommendations to personalize the shopping experience.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Maropost?
paragraphs: Maropost is a unified commerce platform that brings storefronts, inventory, fulfillment, POS, and customer service together with its Marketing Cloud for cross-channel campaigns.
It targets mid-market ecommerce brands and retailers with roughly $20 million to $200 million in revenue, and includes AI-driven tools such as Da Vinci AI for predictive intelligence.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Maropost is for
paragraphs: Maropost is built for mid-market retail and ecommerce brands that need marketing automation connected to storefront, inventory, and POS data rather than a standalone email tool.

name: Autopilot
skip_reason: Product has been rebranded/renamed: autopilothq.com now permanently redirects (301) to ortto.com, where the site states "Autopilot is now Ortto." The Autopilot product no longer exists under this name, so no accurate content can be written for a listing titled Autopilot.

enrichment.short_description: Multi-channel customer engagement platform for personalized email, SMS, and push campaigns, with a 14-day free trial.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Vero lets product teams send personalized email, SMS, and push campaigns with a visual journey builder; plans start at $54/month.

features.title: Visual journey builder
features.description: Design multi-step, multi-channel campaigns visually.

features.title: Multi-channel messaging
features.description: Send email, SMS, and iOS/Android push notifications from one platform.

features.title: A/B testing
features.description: Test campaign variants across channels.

features.title: Data-warehouse segmentation
features.description: Segment users via API or direct SQL connections to warehouses like Snowflake and BigQuery.

features.title: Drag-and-drop templates
features.description: Build emails with a drag-and-drop template builder.

features.title: Broad integrations
features.description: Connect to Segment, Salesforce, Google Analytics, Twilio, and reverse ETL tools like Census and Hightouch.

pros: Segmentation can be driven directly from a SQL data warehouse (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift), not just imported lists
14-day free trial with no credit card required
Broad integration list including reverse ETL tools (Census, Hightouch)
99.99% uptime and a 4.3-star G2 rating cited on the site
cons: No free plan, only a time-limited free trial
Entry-level Starter plan ($54/month) is pricier than many basic email tools
Professional plan pricing is custom/usage-based and not listed publicly
Starter plan support is limited to 24/5, with 24/7 support reserved for Professional

faqs.question: Does Vero offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What channels can Vero send messages through?
faqs.answer: Email, SMS, and push notifications for iOS and Android.

faqs.question: How much does Vero cost?
faqs.answer: The Starter plan is $54/month ($49/month billed annually) for 5,000 profiles and 10,000 emails/month; the Professional plan is custom-priced based on usage.

faqs.question: Can Vero segment users from a data warehouse?
faqs.answer: Yes, it supports segmentation via direct SQL connections to warehouses like Snowflake, BigQuery, and Redshift.

use_cases.title: Product-led lifecycle messaging
use_cases.description: Product teams trigger onboarding and engagement emails, SMS, and push based on in-app behavior.

use_cases.title: Data-warehouse-driven segmentation
use_cases.description: Teams with a Snowflake or BigQuery warehouse segment users directly via SQL instead of syncing static lists.

use_cases.title: Multi-channel campaign testing
use_cases.description: Marketers A/B test messaging across email, SMS, and push from one journey builder.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Vero?
paragraphs: Vero is a customer engagement platform that lets teams send personalized email, SMS, and push notifications from a single visual journey builder.
It integrates directly with data warehouses like Snowflake and BigQuery for segmentation, in addition to tools such as Segment, Salesforce, and Twilio.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Vero is for
paragraphs: Vero is aimed at product-led teams that already have user data in a warehouse or via API and want to build multi-channel messaging on top of it, rather than teams looking for a free basic email tool.

name: MessageBird
skip_reason: Product has been rebranded: messagebird.com now permanently redirects (301) to bird.com under the new brand name "Bird." The product no longer operates as MessageBird, so writing content under that name would misrepresent the current offering.

enrichment.short_description: Customer engagement platform for push, SMS/RCS, email, and in-app messaging, with AI-assisted campaign orchestration and a free tier.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: OneSignal sends push, SMS, email, and in-app messages with AI-assisted campaigns; free plan available, paid plans start at $19/month.

features.title: Mobile and web push
features.description: Send push notifications to mobile apps and websites.

features.title: SMS/RCS and email
features.description: Send SMS/RCS and email messages from the same platform as push.

features.title: In-app messaging
features.description: Deliver in-app messages as part of lifecycle campaigns.

features.title: AI-assisted orchestration
features.description: Define brand guardrails and let OneSignal's AI draft, send, test, and optimize campaigns.

features.title: Journey automation
features.description: Automate onboarding, engagement, and retention journeys.

features.title: A/B testing
features.description: Basic A/B testing on the Free plan, advanced testing on paid tiers.

features.title: Broad SDK support
features.description: SDKs for Android, iOS, Flutter, React Native, Expo, and Unity.

pros: Free plan includes unlimited mobile push sends, not just a capped trial
AI orchestration can draft and optimize campaigns automatically
Wide platform SDK support (Flutter, React Native, Expo, Unity)
Claims 2 million+ businesses and 12 billion+ messages sent per day
cons: Free plan email sends are capped at 10,000/month and web push at 10,000 subscribers per send
Growth plan adds usage-based costs on top of the $19/month base for email and push volume
Professional and Enterprise plans require annual contracts with custom pricing
Advanced personalization and higher journey/segment limits are gated to paid tiers

faqs.question: Is OneSignal free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes 10,000 email sends/month and unlimited mobile push sends at no cost.

faqs.question: How much do paid OneSignal plans cost?
faqs.answer: The Growth plan starts at $19/month plus usage-based costs for email and push volume; Professional and Enterprise are custom-priced annual contracts.

faqs.question: Does OneSignal use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, its AI can draft, send, test, and optimize campaigns automatically based on defined brand guardrails.

faqs.question: What platforms does OneSignal support?
faqs.answer: Android, iOS, Flutter, React Native, Expo, and Unity, alongside web and email.

use_cases.title: Mobile app engagement
use_cases.description: Apps send push notifications for onboarding, retention, and re-engagement using native SDKs.

use_cases.title: Cross-channel lifecycle campaigns
use_cases.description: Marketers combine push, email, and SMS in a single automated journey.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted messaging at scale
use_cases.description: Teams set brand guidelines and let OneSignal's AI handle drafting and optimization of ongoing campaigns.

features: Mobile push $0.012 per monthly active user

long_form_blocks.heading: What is OneSignal?
paragraphs: OneSignal is a customer engagement platform for sending push notifications, SMS/RCS, email, and in-app messages from one dashboard.
Its AI can draft, send, test, and optimize campaigns automatically within brand guidelines the team defines, across onboarding, engagement, and retention journeys.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who OneSignal is for
paragraphs: OneSignal fits mobile and web app teams that need push notifications as a core channel, plus email and SMS, and want to start on a free plan before scaling to usage-based pricing.

enrichment.short_description: Multichannel push notification platform for web, mobile, and WhatsApp, with a free plan and an AI notification copywriter.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: PushEngage sends web, mobile, and WhatsApp push notifications with AI-drafted copy; free plan available, paid plans start at $14/month.

features.title: Web push notifications
features.description: Send push notifications across Chrome, Edge, Safari, and Firefox.

features.title: Mobile app push
features.description: Push notifications for iOS and Android, including Flutter and React Native apps.

features.title: WhatsApp and chat widgets
features.description: Message users through WhatsApp Business and on-site chat widgets.

features.title: Visual workflows
features.description: 60+ industry-specific templates with A/B/C split testing.

features.title: Ecommerce automation
features.description: Cart abandonment, price drop, and back-in-stock notification automation.

features.title: AI copywriter
features.description: AI drafts multiple on-brand push notification variants.

features.title: Native integrations
features.description: Connect with HubSpot, Shopify Plus, WooCommerce, and WordPress.

pros: Free plan available, not just a trial (up to 200 subscribers)
AI copywriter drafts multiple notification variants automatically
Deep WordPress/WooCommerce integration with a 400K+ install WordPress plugin
14-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
cons: Free plan is limited to 200 subscribers and 30 campaigns
Higher subscriber limits and ecommerce automation (cart abandonment, back-in-stock) require the Growth plan or above
Enterprise-level features (custom integrations, unlimited sub-accounts) require custom quotes
Headquarters not stated on the site (product is owned by Awesome Motive)

faqs.question: Is PushEngage free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan covers 1 site/app, up to 200 subscribers, and 30 campaigns.

faqs.question: How much does PushEngage cost?
faqs.answer: Paid plans start at the Business tier: $14/month, or $8/month billed annually.

faqs.question: Does PushEngage support WhatsApp?
faqs.answer: Yes, WhatsApp Business messaging is included alongside web and mobile push.

faqs.question: Does PushEngage use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, its AI copywriter drafts push notification variants and integrates with tools like Claude, Cursor, and OpenAI.

use_cases.title: Ecommerce abandonment recovery
use_cases.description: Stores use push automation to recover abandoned carts and alert users to price drops or restocks.

use_cases.title: WordPress site engagement
use_cases.description: WordPress and WooCommerce sites use the plugin to re-engage visitors with push notifications.

use_cases.title: AI-drafted notification campaigns
use_cases.description: Marketing teams use the AI copywriter to speed up drafting push notification copy.

features: Advanced personalization, timezone sending, A/B testing
Ecommerce automation: cart abandonment, price drop alerts, back-in-stock

long_form_blocks.heading: What is PushEngage?
paragraphs: PushEngage is a multichannel push notification platform covering web push, mobile app push, WhatsApp Business, and chat widgets.
A free plan supports up to 200 subscribers, and paid plans starting at $14/month add higher subscriber limits, unlimited campaigns, and ecommerce automation like cart abandonment recovery.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who PushEngage is for
paragraphs: PushEngage is built for retention and marketing teams, especially in retail, travel, and ecommerce, that want push notifications tied into WordPress, Shopify, or WooCommerce with AI-assisted copywriting.

enrichment.short_description: Full-stack customer engagement platform combining a customer data platform, journey automation, and AI-driven personalization.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WebEngage unifies customer data, journey automation, and omnichannel messaging with AI-driven personalization for retention marketing.

features.title: Customer Data Platform
features.description: Consolidates data from multiple sources into unified customer profiles.

features.title: Product & revenue analytics
features.description: Cohort analysis, behavioral funnels, and real-time event tracking.

features.title: Customer segmentation
features.description: Live and static segments with RFM modeling.

features.title: Omnichannel engagement
features.description: Send email, SMS, WhatsApp, web/mobile push, and social retargeting campaigns.

features.title: Journey designer
features.description: Automate workflows triggered by customer or business events.

features.title: AI-driven personalization
features.description: Generative AI content, engagement scoring, predictive segmentation, and catalog recommendations.

pros: Combines a customer data platform with messaging in one product, rather than requiring a separate CDP
Includes RFM-based segmentation and cohort/funnel analytics, not just campaign sending
AI features cover content generation, scoring, and product recommendations
Cited as trusted by 850+ global brands
cons: No public pricing is published; details require a demo request
No founding year or headquarters information published on the site
No documented free plan or trial mentioned on the homepage
Integration details are not listed publicly beyond references to developer docs

faqs.question: What is WebEngage?
faqs.answer: A full-stack customer engagement platform combining customer data, analytics, segmentation, and omnichannel messaging.

faqs.question: Does WebEngage publish its pricing?
faqs.answer: No, pricing is not listed publicly; you need to request a demo.

faqs.question: What channels does WebEngage support?
faqs.answer: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, web and mobile push notifications, and social retargeting.

faqs.question: Does WebEngage use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes generative AI for content, engagement scoring, predictive segmentation, and catalog recommendations.

use_cases.title: Unified customer data and messaging
use_cases.description: Teams consolidate customer data into unified profiles and act on it directly through messaging campaigns.

use_cases.title: Behavioral analytics-driven campaigns
use_cases.description: Teams use cohort analysis and funnels to identify drop-off points, then trigger journeys to address them.

use_cases.title: AI-personalized engagement
use_cases.description: Brands use AI-driven recommendations and predictive segmentation to personalize omnichannel messages.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WebEngage?
paragraphs: WebEngage is a full-stack customer engagement and retention platform that unifies customer data, analytics, and segmentation with omnichannel messaging.
It includes AI features such as generative content, engagement scoring, predictive segmentation, and catalog recommendations to personalize campaigns.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WebEngage is for
paragraphs: WebEngage is aimed at consumer brands that need a combined customer data platform and messaging engine, and are comfortable going through a sales demo since pricing is not public.

name: CleverTap
skip_reason: Official website (clevertap.com) returned HTTP 403 Forbidden on every attempted page (homepage, /pricing/, /platform/), blocking automated fetching. Could not verify pricing, features, founding, or company facts directly from the primary source, so no content was written to avoid relying solely on third-party summaries.
